description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a broad, rectangular seat and a tall, straight backrest, both upholstered in a light gray fabric. The armrests are constructed from a dark wood material, forming a continuous frame that wraps around the sides and back, providing both structural support and a visual accent. The upholstery appears smooth and tightly fitted, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic. The seat and backrest are generously padded, offering comfort for extended sitting. The base of the chaise is low and solid, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and stable appearance. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern chaise with light gray upholstery, dark wood armrests, and a clean, boxy silhouette. The seat and backrest are padded and smooth, with a continuous wooden frame accentuating the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded seat and backrest, with the dark wood armrest forming a rectangular frame on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, tall backrest, and symmetrical wooden armrests on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the right-side wooden armrest and the smooth upholstery visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden frame and the full height of the backrest, with the upholstery wrapping around the back.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and rectangular, fully upholstered in light gray fabric with a smooth, unsegmented surface and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, constructed from dark wood and forming a continuous rectangular frame that wraps around the sides and back.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the chaise appears to have a solid, low-profile base that sits directly on the ground, integrated with the wooden frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray with a smooth, tightly fitted texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one for the seat and one for the backrest, both attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no loose or additional cushions visible.
